User.title: User
User.description: Represents an authenticated user, storing their name, email, profile preferences, and watchlist.

uid.description: Unique identifier matching the Firebase Auth UID.

name.description: User's display name from Google Sign-In or profile.

joinedDate.description: ISO timestamp representing when the user first signed in.

isPremium.description: Whether the user has premium status.

watchlistIds.description: List of film IDs in the user's watchlist.

watchHistory.description: List of watched films with their relative playback progress and last watch timestamps.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp or server timestamp representing when the user record was last modified.

/users/{userId}.description: User documents keyed by Auth UID.
